subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! The Day of Resurrection hath come to pass, and the heedless remain in a strange slumber. The hidden mystery hath been unveiled, yet the wayward turn aside [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد قد اتی یوم القیام و الغافلون فی نوم عجیب قد ظهر السر المکنون و المعرضون
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @day of Resurrection; Judgement
